property.name: java.library.path

testcase.name: contextLoads
testcase.system-out:
13:30:21.608 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.example.demo.QuizApplicationTests]: QuizApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 13:30:21.707 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.example.demo.QuizApplication for test class com.example.demo.QuizApplicationTests 13:30:21.796 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.example.demo.QuizApplicationTests]: QuizApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 13:30:21.796 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.example.demo.QuizApplication for test class com.example.demo.QuizApplicationTests 13:30:21.894 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.devtools.restart.RestartApplicationListener -- Restart disabled due to context in which it is running

size: undefined/unknown Maximum pool size: undefined/unknown 2026-05-21T13:30:25.855-05:00 INFO 14276 --- [ main] org.hibernate.orm.core : HHH000489: No JTA platform available (set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) Hibernate: drop table if exists asociaciones cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists club_competicion cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists clubes cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists competiciones cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists entrenadores cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists jugadores cascade Hibernate: create table asociaciones (id bigint generated by default as identity, nombre varchar(255), pais varchar(255), presidente varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table club_competicion (club_id bigint not null, competicion_id bigint not null) Hibernate: create table clubes (asociacion_id bigint, entrenador_id bigint, id bigint generated by default as identity, nombre varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table competiciones (fecha_fin date, fecha_inicio date, monto_premio float(53), id bigint generated by default as identity, nombre varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table entrenadores (edad integer not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, apellido varchar(255), nacionalidad varchar(255), nombre varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table jugadores (numero integer not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, apellido varchar(255), nombre varchar(255), posicion varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: alter table if exists club_competicion add constraint FKrq56s8st9bfvgmhr932n9jm29 foreign key (competicion_id) references competiciones Hibernate: alter table if exists club_competicion add constraint FK49lj5v8ms7w27xbalu5vikamh foreign key (club_id) references clubes Hibernate: alter table if exists clubes add constraint FKqo3djd5oghqqdc4lgbsbo2s5s foreign key (asociacion_id) references asociaciones Hibernate: alter table if exists clubes add constraint FKsq1qkhct2xelr1wjuyrv8kn0t foreign key (entrenador_id) references entrenadores Hibernate: INSERT INTO asociaciones (nombre, pais, presidente) VALUES ('FIFA', 'Suiza', 'Gianni Infantino') Hibernate: INSERT INTO entrenadores (nombre, apellido, edad, nacionalidad) VALUES ('Pep', 'Guardiola', 53, 'EspaÃ±ola') Hibernate: INSERT INTO jugadores (nombre, apellido, numero, posicion) VALUES ('Lionel', 'Messi', 10, 'Delantero') Hibernate: INSERT INTO competiciones (nombre, monto_premio, fecha_inicio, fecha_fin) VALUES ('Copa Libertadores', 5000000, '2026-01-01', '2026-12-01') Hibernate: INSERT INTO club (nombre, asociacion_id) VALUES ('Real Santander', 1);'Copa Libertadores') 2026-05-21T13:30:25.946-05:00 WARN 14276 --- [ main] o.h.t.s.i.ExceptionHandlerLoggedImpl : GenerationTarget encountered exception accepting command : Error executing DDL "INSERT INTO club (nombre, asociacion_id) VALUES ('Real Santander', 1);'Copa Libertadores')" via JDBC [Tabla "CLUB" no encontrada Table "CLUB" not found;]
